threatActors.name: APT28 (Fancy Bear)
threatActors.description: A Russian state-sponsored group known for cyber espionage and attacks on government and military targets.
threatActors.motivation: Political and strategic intelligence gathering
threatActors.defense: Implement strong network segmentation, use multi-factor authentication, and regularly update software to mitigate risks from APT28.

threatActors.name: Lazarus Group
threatActors.description: A North Korean state-sponsored group involved in cyber espionage, financial theft, and destructive attacks.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain and political objectives
threatActors.defense: Deploy advanced threat detection systems, implement strict access controls, and conduct regular security audits to counter the threats posed by the Lazarus Group.

threatActors.name: Charming Kitten (APT35)
threatActors.description: An Iranian state-sponsored group focused on cyber espionage against individuals and organizations in the Middle East and beyond.
threatActors.motivation: Political intelligence gathering and surveillance
threatActors.defense: Implement strong network segmentation, use multi-factor authentication, and regularly update software to mitigate risks from Charming Kitten.

threatActors.name: Turla (Snake)
threatActors.description: A Russian state-sponsored group known for sophisticated cyber espionage campaigns targeting government and military organizations.
threatActors.motivation: Political and strategic intelligence gathering
threatActors.defense: Implement strong network segmentation, use multi-factor authentication, and regularly update software to mitigate risks from Turla.

threatActors.name: OceanLotus (APT32)
threatActors.description: A Vietnamese state-sponsored group involved in cyber espionage and attacks against government, corporate, and dissident targets.
threatActors.motivation: Political intelligence gathering and economic espionage
threatActors.defense: Implement strong network segmentation, use multi-factor authentication, and regularly update software to mitigate risks from OceanLotus.

threatActors.name: Equation Group
threatActors.description: A highly sophisticated group believed to be linked to the NSA, known for advanced cyber espionage and offensive capabilities.
threatActors.motivation: Intelligence gathering and cyber warfare
threatActors.defense: Implement strong network segmentation, use multi-factor authentication, and regularly update software to mitigate risks from Equation Group.

threatActors.name: Cobalt Group
threatActors.description: A cybercriminal group known for targeting financial institutions with sophisticated malware and attack techniques.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through cybercrime
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Cobalt Group.

threatActors.name: FIN7 (Carbanak Group)
threatActors.description: A financially motivated cybercriminal group known for targeting retail and hospitality sectors with sophisticated malware.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through cybercrime
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from FIN7.

threatActors.name: Magecart
threatActors.description: A collective of cybercriminal groups specializing in web skimming attacks to steal payment card information from e-commerce sites.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through cybercrime
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Magecart.

threatActors.name: DarkSide
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for high-profile attacks on critical infrastructure and large enterprises, often demanding significant ransoms.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from DarkSide.

threatActors.name: REvil (Sodinokibi)
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for targeting large enterprises and demanding high ransoms, often using double extortion tactics.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from REvil.

threatActors.name: Conti
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for targeting healthcare, government, and enterprise organizations with sophisticated ransomware attacks.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Conti.

threatActors.name: LockBit
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for targeting a wide range of industries with fast encryption and high ransom demands.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from LockBit.

threatActors.name: Babuk Locker
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for targeting government and enterprise organizations, often using double extortion tactics.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
notableAttacks: 2021 Washington D.C. Police Department Ransomware Attack
2021 Los Angeles Unified School District Ransomware Attack
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Babuk Locker.

threatActors.name: Evil Corp
threatActors.description: A cybercriminal group known for targeting financial institutions and enterprises with sophisticated malware and ransomware attacks.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through cybercrime
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Evil Corp.

threatActors.name: NetWalker
threatActors.description: A ransomware group known for targeting healthcare and government organizations, often using double extortion tactics.
threatActors.motivation: Financial gain through ransomware attacks
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from NetWalker.

threatActors.name: Sunburst (SolarWinds Attack)
threatActors.description: A sophisticated supply chain attack attributed to a state-sponsored group, involving the compromise of SolarWinds software to infiltrate multiple organizations.
threatActors.motivation: Intelligence gathering and cyber espionage
threatActors.defense: Implement strong access controls, use advanced threat detection systems, and conduct regular security audits to mitigate risks from Sunburst.
